feature.name: Long Animation Frames style duration
feature.creator: yoavweiss@chromium.org
feature.summary: Add `styleDuration` and `forcedStyleDuration` information to the Long Animation Frame API, enabling developers to distinguish style and layout times.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2026-01-19 by yoavweiss@chromium.org). Add `styleDuration` and `forcedStyleDuration` information to the Long Animation Frame API, enabling developers to distinguish style and layout times. Category: Performance. Blink component: Blink>PerformanceAPIs. Stars: 73.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.

incubation.finding: Feature targets web feature 'Missing feature'. This is not an official WebDX feature. Problem definition depends on the spec/explainer which was not directly accessible.
incubation.limitations: No public explainer or incubation discussion accessible.

prototype.finding: No public evidence of prototype-stage friction logs, API ergonomics testing, or framework integration.

developerTrials.finding: No developer trial was conducted or required for this feature.

adoption.finding: The legacy HTML/JS counter 'LongAnimationFrameTimingStyleDuration' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 5809) measured 0.4805% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2026-04-13 with 124 data points. Mapping confidence: exact.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures this feature directly but may include pre-existing usage.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
